idea-plugin.name: Mermaid Preview
idea-plugin.description:
Mermaid diagrams, rendered live inside your Markdown files

Open any .md, .markdown, or .mdx file and every fenced mermaid block appears rendered in a side tool window — with a per-block toggle to flip between the source code and the rendered diagram.

Features

  • Auto-detect every ```mermaid block in the file you have open.
  • Per-block toggle: Diagram ↔ Code — inspect the source without leaving the panel.
  • Export: download each diagram as SVG or PNG, copy the source to the clipboard.
  • Actionable error overlay: syntax errors show the mermaid parser message and highlight the offending line. No more generic "💣 Syntax error in text".
  • Live refresh on file switch and as you type (250 ms debounce).
  • Dark / light theme follows your IDE preference.
  • 100% offline — mermaid 10.9.3 is bundled inside the plugin jar. No network calls, ever.

Supported diagram types

Everything mermaid 10.x supports: flowcharts, sequence diagrams, state diagrams, class diagrams, ER diagrams, gantt charts, pie charts, git graphs, user journeys, mindmaps, quadrant charts, and timelines.

Supported IDEs

Any JetBrains IDE on the IntelliJ Platform 2023.3 or newer with JCEF enabled (the default for the bundled JetBrains Runtime): IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, RubyMine, CLion, Rider, PhpStorm, DataGrip, Android Studio.

Links

  • Source on GitHub
  • Issue tracker
  • Demo file with 12 sample diagrams

Made by SlothLabs — part of the CloudOrbit / DataOrbit / BastionOrbit / ProxyOrbit / WattsOrbit family.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.2 — May 2026

  • First JetBrains Marketplace release.
  • Longer description, plugin icon, change-notes metadata.

0.1.1 — May 2026

  • New: per-block SVG / PNG / Copy source actions in the card header.
  • New: actionable error overlay — shows mermaid parser message and highlights the offending line, no more generic bomb icon.
  • Rebundled resources are re-extracted on every IDE launch for faster dev loop.

0.1.0 — May 2026

  • Initial release — tool window, per-block toggle Diagram ↔ Code, debounced live refresh, bundled mermaid 10.9.3.
